title: hypolytrum longifolium subsp. longifolium
intro: Hypolytrum longifolium subsp. longifolium, also known as the long-leaved hypolytrum, is a species of plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae), native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Hypolytrum longifolium subsp. longifolium can be prepared as an herbal remedy, often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
